# Devsphinx

> Devsphinx is a founder-led AI-first software studio. We build AI agent systems, AI-first SaaS products, and custom software — with AI as the core architecture, not an added feature. Founded and led by Salman Nausher.

## Services
- AI Agent Systems — autonomous multi-agent systems for sales, support, and operations, built on Claude and MCP.
- AI-First Software — SaaS platforms, internal tools, and vertical applications built with AI as the core architecture, on Next.js, React, and Node.js.
- AI Automation Audits — architecture and build-plan engagements for teams that know there's automation potential but need it scoped first.

## Facts
- Delivery: fixed-price, founder-led, no hourly billing.
- Timeline: AI agent systems in 3–5 weeks; AI-first MVPs in 4–8 weeks.
- Pricing: agent systems from $8,000 USD; AI-first MVPs from $12,000 USD; retainers from $2,500/month USD.
- Contact: hello@devshinx.dev
- Founder: Salman Nausher, Founder & Principal Engineer.
- NDAs signed on request before any discovery call.

- Homepage: https://www.devshinx.dev/

- AI Dispatch Platform case study: https://www.devshinx.dev/case-studies/dispatch-platform/
